name: app-rustdesk
description: Instala o RustDesk Server (servidor de acesso remoto self-hosted) como uma stack Docker Swarm.

required_inputs.name: DOMAIN_HBBS
required_inputs.description: Domínio para o Servidor de ID (HBBS) (ex: hbbs.oriondesign.art.br)

required_inputs.name: DOMAIN_HBBR
required_inputs.description: Domínio para o Servidor de Relay (HBBR) (ex: hbbr.oriondesign.art.br)
